title: Fried Boudin Balls
description: Crispy fried boudin balls are a delicious twist on traditional boudin. Perfect as a snack or appetizer.
instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 375°F (190°C).
In a large bowl, combine the boudin, fried rice, flour, egg, and breadcrumbs. Mix well until just combined.
Using your hands, shape the mixture into small balls, about 1 1/2 inches in diameter.
Dredge the boudin balls in the flour, shaking off any excess.
Gently place the boudin balls into the hot oil, being careful not to overcrowd the pan.
Fry the boudin balls for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and crispy.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the boudin balls from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the fried boudin balls hot and enjoy!
